name: Sr. Rosalia's Cake Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over low heat, cook 1 cup sugar, 1/2 cup margarine, 1/2 cup shortening, and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
2. Gradually add the cold paste (milk and flour mixture) to the creamed ingredients, mixing well after each addition.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
